title: epipactis preinensis
intro: Epipactis preinensis, also known as the Prein's Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Epipactis preinensis are typically made from its roots and leaves, which can be used in infusions, teas, or tinctures.
